Home › South London › Richmond › The Dysart Petersham
⭐ Featured Restaurant

Modern British / Arts & Crafts

The Dysart Petersham

★ 4.6 (876 Google reviews)
$$$ 📍 135 Petersham Road, Richmond
🍽️

About The Dysart Petersham

Set in a stunning Arts and Crafts building opposite Richmond Park, The Dysart is a genuinely special restaurant for families marking a special occasion. The Sunday lunch is exceptional — properly creative British cooking in one of the most beautiful dining rooms in South West London. Not for toddlers, but primary-age children who appreciate good food will remember this meal.

Kid-friendly features

🍽️
Kids menu ❌ No
🪑
Highchairs ✅ Yes
🌿
Outdoor space ✅ Yes
🎠
Soft play area ❌ No
🚿
Baby changing ❌ No
🛻
Buggy accessible ✅ Yes
🔊
Noise level Quiet
📅
Booking Yes
👶
Best for primary, all ages

Tags

#michelin star#richmond park#sunday lunch#special occasion#arts crafts
